action: Normalize historical continuity queue record shapes before enforcing inherited-unresolved lineage.

selected_from.selection_reason: M-010 explicitly hands off a normalization loader for historical M-* records before repository-wide gating.

unresolved_inherited: automatic discovery of undeclared lineage dependencies
resolved_claims: normalization adapter for older queue-update schemas

progress.memory: Continuity validation must normalize schema variants before judging lineage; otherwise old record shapes can become invisible and unresolved work can disappear without an explicit decision.
progress.verification: GitHub confirmed source, test, and evidence commits. Test execution and CI execution were not observed.

claim_states.observed: M-010 requested a historical normalization loader; the loader and five-case deterministic test source are committed.
claim_states.inferred: Schema normalization is required to prevent historical record shape from functioning as an accidental validation bypass.
claim_states.proposed: Add repository discovery and a report-only CI inventory over actual M-* queue-update files.
claim_states.superseded: Manual pre-normalization as a prerequisite for lineage checking.
unresolved: semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata, abstract decision structure, and synthetic test records only. Raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
handoff: Add repository file discovery, run the loader over actual M-* queue updates in report-only mode, and preserve all detected forks or dropped claims as unresolved evidence rather than rewriting history.
